channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Manitoba legislature approves budget with potential expansion of food tax relief
item.description: The Manitoba government has passed a significant budget vote in the provincial legislature, which may lead to an expansion of the food tax cut in Winnipeg and across Manitoba. This measure is intended...

item.title: Army clears Lt Col Shrikant Purohit for promotion after acquittal in Malegaon blast case
item.description: Lieutenant Colonel Shrikant Purohit, who was acquitted in the Malegaon blast case, has been approved for promotion to the rank of brigadier. After spending nearly nine years in custody, Purohit was gr...

item.title: Starmer and Trump discuss reopening of Strait of Hormuz following Middle East ceasefire
item.description: Sir Keir Starmer recently held discussions with former US President Donald Trump concerning the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial maritime passage for global shipping. The talks came in the...

item.title: AFP Chief Brawner stresses united ASEAN approach to address maritime security issues
item.description: Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) Chief General Romeo Brawner Jr. emphasized the importance of stronger cooperation among ASEAN member countries to confront the region’s increasing maritime securi...

item.title: Bronwyn Kuss Explores Adulting, Parenthood and Millennial Life in 'Bronwyn & Sons'
item.description: Bronwyn Kuss’s show 'Bronwyn & Sons', featured at the Melbourne International Comedy Festival, is a deadpan, introspective look at life in your late 30s. The performance revolves around navigating the...

item.title: Matonya appears in Mombasa court over rape accusation
item.description: Tanzanian bongo flava singer Matonya has been arraigned before a Mombasa court after being accused of rape. According to reports, the musician was allegedly involved in a sexual assault case that occu...

item.title: Trump Confirms US Troops Will Stay Near Iran Until Peace Deal Fully Implemented
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced that American military forces, including ships, aircraft, and personnel, will continue to be stationed in and around Iran until a comprehensive and enforceable ...

item.title: Understanding Orthodox Easter: Traditions, Dates and Global Celebrations
item.description: Orthodox Easter, also known as Pascha, will be celebrated on Sunday, 12 April, marking the resurrection of Jesus Christ and the triumph of life over death. While Australia recently enjoyed its Easter ...

item.title: Ex-IAS Officer Subodh Agarwal Arrested for Alleged Tender Irregularities in Jal Jeevan Mission
item.description: The Rajasthan Anti-Corruption Bureau (ACB) has arrested former IAS officer Subodh Agarwal in connection with alleged irregularities in the Jal Jeevan Mission tendering process. Agarwal had been evadin...

item.title: Governor Dauda Lawal honoured for infrastructure achievements in Zamfara
item.description: Governor Dauda Lawal of Zamfara State don receive di Infrastructure Governor of the Year award from di Broadcasting Organisations of Nigeria (BON) for di transformative works wey him administration do...

item.title: Perth Bears Prepare for NRL Debut Amid Recruitment and Logistical Challenges
item.description: The Perth Bears are gearing up to join the NRL in 2027, less than a year from now, but the fledgling club faces significant hurdles. So far, the Bears have announced just 16 players, leaving nearly ha...

item.title: Doug Ford's Housing Policy Success Overshadowed by Distractions and Controversial Moves

item.title: Coach Cholo Villanueva opens state-of-the-art basketball training facility in Pasay
item.description: Coach Cholo Villanueva, a well-known figure in the Philippine basketball scene, has launched a new basketball facility in Pasay aimed at nurturing local talent. The facility, called 'Hoops Haven', is ...

item.title: Al Sharpton's Continued Political Influence in New York and Beyond
item.description: Rev. Al Sharpton remains a central figure in American politics, drawing the attention of high-profile politicians nationwide. At the 35th convention of his National Action Network in New York, governo...

item.title: Kerala High Court grants 30-day extension to VACB for probe into Sabarimala ghee sale irregularities
item.description: The Kerala High Court has granted the Vigilance and Anti-Corruption Bureau (VACB) an additional 30 days to conclude its investigation into alleged financial irregularities in the sale of 'Adiya Sishta...

item.title: Test Your Knowledge with This Fun Friday Quiz
item.description: The Daily News presents a fun and challenging quiz with 20 questions that cover a wide range of topics, from geography and science to culture and history. The questions test knowledge of South African...

item.title: Nigeria's Economic Landscape: Key Insights from April 10, 2026 Edition of BusinessDay
item.description: In the April 10, 2026 edition of BusinessDay, several critical developments are highlighted, focusing on Nigeria's economic struggles and reforms. Key among these is the ongoing blackout, which has co...

item.title: Security lockdown causes severe disruption for Rawalpindi and Islamabad residents
item.description: In the twin cities of Rawalpindi and Islamabad, residents faced extreme inconvenience as authorities imposed strict security measures ahead of the high-profile US-Iran peace talks. Key areas, includin...

item.title: Afrika Bambaataa, Founding Figure of Hip-Hop Culture, Dies at 68 After Battle with Cancer
item.description: Afrika Bambaataa, one of the foremost pioneers of hip-hop culture, passed away in Pennsylvania at the age of 68 from prostate cancer, as confirmed by his lawyer. Born Lance Taylor in 1957 in the South...

item.title: Lahore High Court declares CNIC not movable property, bars civil courts from blocking it in civil cases
item.description: In a significant judgment delivered on April 10, 2026, the Lahore High Court at its Multan Bench has ruled that the Computerised National Identity Card (CNIC) issued by Nadra does not qualify as movab...
